function.message: I can’t confirm an explicit birthday for the home server from canonical records. Please confirm whether you want the commissioned date or created date.
function.rulebook_notes: Top-level AGENTS.MD says entity files are authoritative for birthdays when present, and if the canonical file does not show the needed fact, ask for clarification instead of guessing.
function.outcome_justification: The canonical home server record at /10_entities/cast/juniper.md contains created_on and commissioned_on but no birthday field. Per /AGENTS.MD, missing canonical birthday requires clarification rather than inference.
